summary: Well-structured bats test suite with 15 tests covering all four main tagging conventions (main→latest, PR→pr-{number}, semver→v{version}, feature→branch-sha), tag sanitization rules (case, special chars, hyphens), and error handling. Good organization with clear section headers and independent test cases. Lacks coverage for boundary conditions: empty/short SHA values, non-semver tag handling, PR+semver combination behavior, invalid empty inputs, and branch names that sanitize to empty. Would reliably catch regressions in standard workflows but miss edge case bugs.
